description: Product Description Why Choose De feuiles Baby Fleece Romper ? Skin friendly coral velvet material,fluffy and soft touch, this cute romper likes a blanket wraps your baby, keep your little one warm and cosy Bright colors, simple and cute patterns, your baby will looks more adorable on this romper, bring wonderful memories for your little one It's an essential one piece romper for your baby, suitable for daily casual wear,memorable photography shoots,birthday party or as sleepsuit Product Details Crewneck Design Classic round neck romper outfit, simple,comfortable yet stylish Elastic cuff design, windproof and warm,great for autumn,winter , you baby will like it Soft and Warm Fabric Soft touch fluffy coral fleece for a snug and warm feel ,comfortable to wear Machine or hand washable under 30ºwith soft Laundry detergent Buttons Closure Button closure for easy wear and take off,convenient for diapers changing Ideal baby birthday gift/Christmas gift for baby girls or boys Make everyday a happy day with this cute romper outfit Size is for reference only cause baby's body measurements are different , please check the size chart before order.
